home.tagline: Art for your heart and for your mind
home.heading: David Kitching | KitchingArt
home.subtitle: Original giclee art prints from the artist's own website
home.abstractDesc: Various takes from just pretty colours to pondering the meaning of life. Bold shapes and colours with different variants to match your existing decor... frameless or with one of two frame styles.
home.interpretiveDesc: Interpretations of aspects of life and our world.
home.noTariffs: No import taxes or tariffs in the US, Canada, the UK, the EU, GCC countries, Singapore or Australia.
home.onDemand: Your picture will be produced on demand according to your specification in either the US, Canada, the UK, the EU, Dubai, Singapore or Australia, depending on where you're located.
home.oneManBand: (Yes this is still just me. One person. Not a big company.)
